title: Backpacked: World of Color
description: Add-on for Backpacked! Adds 16 dye variants to the Standard Backpack!
body:
# Backpacked: World of Color
*   An add-on for [Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked) by MrCrayfish
*   Adds all 16 dyed color variants to the Standard Backpack
*   Craft a backpack using the dye of your choice to obtain the corresponding color
*   For <= v2.0.0, all color variants are unlocked by default, no progression required

## Known Issues
*   **<= v2.0.0**
    *   Mouse wheel scrolling does not function inside the backpack GUI
    *   **Workaround:** Use the scrollbar on the side of the GUI to navigate backpack slots

##
